name: vitalclaw-health-routing
description: Project-scoped routing so Codex answers health questions from VitalClaw first.

interface.shortDescription: Routes project health questions through VitalClaw before generic reasoning
interface.longDescription: Use the VitalClaw Health Routing plugin to answer current-status, recovery, trend, and alert questions from this workspace by calling VitalClaw's top-level answer wrapper first.
defaultPrompt: Show me what VitalClaw sees today.
Do I have any recovery alerts right now?
